title: crataegus oxyacantha var. ovata
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. ovata, also known as hawthorn tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and vasodilatory effects. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha var. ovata include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the functioning of the heart and blood vessels. It can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used to support heart health, lower cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
